title: extended class
description: Subclass instance whose serializable shape combines its own extendedProp with the inherited baseProp. Confirms inherited string fields are walked and round-tripped alongside own fields.
notes: Inherited baseProp is included in the projection; both fields are plain strings so the round-trip is symmetric (no deserializedValues override).
